messages.text:
What it is: Run onboarding negotiation against ldecorps/free-email-scanner
What it solves: The onboarding-negotiation machinery already exists and is shipped:
BL-269 (onboarding generates target prompts), BL-344 (iterative negotiation
loop), BL-360 (target use-case inventory), BL-382 (verbosity negotiated
into the contract) — see extension/src/tools/negotiate-onboarding-contract.ts,
prop…
How it works: Surveying the target repo produces a proposed scope contract
